resultList.dtldesc: Navin Jayaram Garden is a beautiful river side property by reputed builder Navins. This property has 216 apartments packed with all necessary amenities for the families. The 2BHK apartment is pool view and is 1031 sqft. The facilities include a pool, rock garden with play area, Gym, reading room, multi purpose hall & a game room. There is power backup, sewage treatment facility and 24 hour security at all gates. The property is located at an upscale locality at manapakkam, opposite to IAS/IPS colony. World famous babuji memorial ashram & L&T IT head office is at walkable distable. DLF back gate is hardly 1.5 kms from the apartment. There is a sports academy near by and famous hospitals like MIOT is less than 2 kms. Guindy metro station is around 6 kms and Chennai Trade center is close by 2 Kms. The locality is very near to Chennai Airport (9 kms). Schools near by are PSBB, Hindustan & Omega International. The apartment is very ideal for families looking to live in a peaceful community, yet in the heart of chennai city. The apartment itself is inhabited by IT professionals, CAs, Lawyers & Doctors.
